label: v1.2.0-pre baseline (first end-to-end smoke)
purpose: First end-to-end activation of an academic adapter against real data. Measures the L0+FTS5 baseline before HRR vocabulary bridge (P4) and BFS multi-hop chaining (P3) port from lab. These numbers are the floor; lab v1.1 numbers are the ceiling once those features land.

runs.notes: avg_beliefs=0 at this v1.0.x baseline is the expected and documented behavior. Public retrieve() is L0+FTS5 BM25 only; the use_hrr / use_bfs flags are accepted by retrieve_v2 but no-op until lab features port. The LongMemEval paper itself reports BM25 session-level Recall@5 = 0.634 (not the same metric but the same general failure mode). Real numbers begin to appear at P3 (BFS) and P4 (HRR).

Single-session-user category should be the easiest for keyword overlap (questions about facts the user stated directly in one session). avg_beliefs=0 here too suggests the FTS5 BM25 needs help — likely from HRR vocabulary expansion since user questions paraphrase the answer rather than echo its keywords.

infrastructure_validated: retrieve_v2 lab-compat wrapper signature accepted by adapter
ingest_turn shim ingests session turns into MemoryStore via FTS5
[benchmarks] optional extras install nltk, tiktoken, datasets, hf_hub
academic-suite adapter import + run end-to-end without code modification beyond a single import alias
contamination gate (verify-clean) detects clean output and exits 0
ground truth and retrieval files are produced in separate JSONs

next_phases_unlocked_by_this_baseline.P3: Port BFS multi-hop chaining and entity-index retrieval; expect avg_beliefs to rise from 0 toward lab v1.1 numbers (LongMemEval ~59% accuracy with reader pass).
next_phases_unlocked_by_this_baseline.P4: Port HRR vocabulary bridge; expect category-by-category gains, especially single-session-user.
next_phases_unlocked_by_this_baseline.Reader/judge passes: Out of scope for this measurement (zero LLM API spend). Will activate behind workflow_dispatch in P6 CI integration.
